title: orlaya bubania
intro: Orlaya bubania, also known as the lesser meadow rue, is a flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orlaya bubania include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Orlaya bubania include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
